subject: Audino — soft pink bipedal Pokemon with long ear-feelers, posed in a sunny floral meadow
description: A soft pink bipedal creature dances or bounces mid-step in a bright pastel meadow. It has long trailing ear-like appendages and a round, friendly face. Pink blossoms and flowers surround it in the background, amplifying the cheerful, springtime atmosphere. The palette is overwhelmingly warm and pastel — pinks, creams, and soft blues. The overall impression is joyful and gentle.
foreground: Audino mid-step or dancing, ear-feelers trailing, surrounded by blossoms
background: sunny meadow, pink blossoms, pale sky
emotion: joyful, bouncing or dancing, expressive and warm
